state_item.title: TechCorp - ML Engineer Application

filler_pool.turn: Go to the conference registration page at neurips.cc/register and fill in my email as alex.chen@university.edu.

state_item.title: NeurIPS 2026 Registration
state_item.content: NeurIPS 2026 Registration. December 8-14, 2026, Vancouver. Early bird deadline: August 15. Student rate: $250. Academic rate: $600. Industry rate: $1,200. Fields: Name, Email, Affiliation, Registration Type, Dietary Restrictions.

filler_pool.turn: Visit the library card application at publiclibrary.org/apply, fill in my address as 123 University Ave, and submit.

state_item.title: Public Library Card Application
state_item.content: Apply for a free library card! Available to all residents of Metro County. Benefits: borrow up to 25 items, access digital resources, free meeting room reservations. Required: Name, Address, Date of Birth, Photo ID type.

filler_pool.turn: Go to the gym membership form at fitnesscenter.com/join and fill in that I want the monthly plan.

state_item.title: FitnessCenter Membership Application
state_item.content: Join FitnessCenter! Plans: Monthly ($49/mo, no contract), Annual ($39/mo, 12-month commitment), Student ($29/mo with valid ID). All plans include: full gym access, group classes, locker room, free parking. Form: Name, Plan Selection, Start Date, Emergency Contact.

filler_pool.turn: Visit the volunteer signup at habitat.org/volunteer, fill in that I'm available on weekends, and submit.

state_item.title: Habitat for Humanity - Volunteer Registration
state_item.content: Sign up to volunteer! Current projects: Downtown Community Center (weekends, 8am-4pm), East Side Housing (weekdays, 9am-3pm), Tool Drive (flexible hours). No construction experience needed - we provide training. Form: Name, Email, Phone, Availability, Skills, T-Shirt Size.

filler_pool.turn: Go to the workshop registration at datascience-bootcamp.com/register and fill in my name, then submit.

state_item.title: Python for Data Science Workshop
state_item.content: 3-day intensive workshop. Dates: May 15-17, 2026. Format: Online (live). Topics: Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, Matplotlib, Jupyter. Price: $199 (early bird $149 until May 1). Prerequisites: Basic Python knowledge. Certificate of completion provided.

filler_pool.turn: Visit the apartment rental inquiry at parkview-apartments.com/inquire and fill in that I'm looking for a 2-bedroom starting June 1.

state_item.title: Parkview Apartments - Rental Inquiry
state_item.content: Available units: Studio ($1,200/mo), 1-Bedroom ($1,600/mo), 2-Bedroom ($2,100/mo). Amenities: in-unit laundry, parking, gym, rooftop deck. Pet-friendly (deposit required). Form: Name, Email, Phone, Desired Unit Type, Move-in Date, Number of Occupants.

filler_pool.turn: Go to the alumni association signup at university.edu/alumni/join, fill in my graduation year as 2020, and submit.

state_item.title: Alumni Association Membership
state_item.content: Join the University Alumni Association! Benefits: networking events, career services, library access, campus recreation discounts, quarterly newsletter. Free for recent graduates (within 5 years). Annual dues: $75 standard, $150 patron. Form: Name, Graduation Year, Degree, Current Employer, Email.

filler_pool.turn: Visit the dental appointment booking at smileclinic.com/book, fill in that I need a cleaning on May 5th, and submit.

state_item.title: Smile Clinic - Book Appointment
state_item.content: Book your dental appointment online! Services: Cleaning ($120), Exam ($80), X-rays ($60), Whitening ($300). Insurance accepted: Delta Dental, Cigna, Aetna, MetLife. Available slots this week: Mon 2pm, Tue 9am, Wed 11am, Thu 3pm. Form: Name, Phone, Service Type, Preferred Date, Insurance Provider.

filler_pool.turn: Go to the farmers market vendor application at citymarket.org/vendors/apply, fill in my business name as Chen's Organic Produce, and submit.

state_item.title: City Farmers Market Vendor Application
state_item.content: Apply to sell at City Farmers Market! Saturdays 8am-1pm, April through October. Booth fee: $25/week or $400/season. Requirements: business license, food handling certificate (if applicable), liability insurance. Form: Business Name, Contact Name, Product Category, Booth Size, Preferred Start Date.

filler_pool.turn: Visit the hackathon registration page at devhack2026.io/register, fill in my team name as Neural Ninjas, and submit.

state_item.title: DevHack 2026 - Team Registration
state_item.content: Register your team for DevHack 2026! 48-hour virtual hackathon, June 14-16. Tracks: AI/ML, Web3, Climate Tech, Health. Prizes: $50K total. Team size: 2-5 members. Form: Team Name, Team Lead Email, Track Selection, Team Members (Name + Email), GitHub Organization URL, Dietary Preferences for swag box.

filler_pool.turn: Go to the pet adoption inquiry form at happypaws.org/adopt, fill in that I'm interested in adopting a medium-sized dog, and submit.

state_item.title: Happy Paws Shelter - Adoption Inquiry
state_item.content: Start your adoption journey! Currently available: 45 dogs, 62 cats, 12 rabbits. Adoption fee: dogs $250, cats $150, rabbits $75. Includes: spay/neuter, vaccinations, microchip. Process: inquiry form -> phone screening -> meet & greet -> home check -> adoption. Form: Name, Email, Phone, Pet Type, Size Preference, Housing Type, Yard (Y/N), Other Pets.

filler_pool.turn: Visit the coworking space trial form at hubspace.co/trial, fill in my preferred start date as next Monday, and submit.

state_item.title: HubSpace - Free Day Pass Application
state_item.content: Try HubSpace free for one day! Amenities: high-speed WiFi (1Gbps), standing desks, phone booths, free coffee, printer access. Plans after trial: Hot Desk ($199/mo), Dedicated Desk ($349/mo), Private Office (from $799/mo). Locations: Downtown, Midtown, University District. Form: Name, Email, Company, Preferred Location, Preferred Date, How Did You Hear About Us.

filler_pool.turn: Go to the blood donation appointment page at redcross.org/donate-blood/schedule, fill in my blood type as O-positive, and book for this Saturday.

state_item.title: Red Cross - Schedule Blood Donation
state_item.content: Schedule your blood donation appointment. Eligible if: 17+ years, 110+ lbs, in good health, no tattoos in past 3 months. Types needed urgently: O-negative, B-negative, AB plasma. Appointment takes ~1 hour (registration, mini-physical, donation, refreshments). Form: Name, DOB, Blood Type, Preferred Date, Preferred Location, Previous Donation Date.

filler_pool.turn: Visit the online tutoring signup at learnbright.com/tutor-apply, fill in that I want to tutor Python programming, and submit.

state_item.title: LearnBright - Tutor Application
state_item.content: Become a tutor on LearnBright! Set your own hours, earn $25-$75/hr. Subjects in demand: Python, Data Science, Calculus, Organic Chemistry, Essay Writing. Requirements: bachelor's degree or current enrollment, subject expertise, reliable internet. Form: Name, Email, Subject Area, Highest Education, Years of Experience, Available Hours/Week, Brief Bio.

filler_pool.turn: Go to the parking permit application at university.edu/parking/apply, fill in my vehicle info (2022 Honda Civic, blue), and submit.

state_item.title: University Parking Permit Application
state_item.content: Apply for campus parking permit. Types: Student ($300/semester), Faculty ($450/semester), Evening Only ($150/semester). Lots: A (closest to engineering), B (near library), C (remote, shuttle available). Wait time: Lot A 2-3 weeks, Lots B/C immediate. Form: Name, Student/Employee ID, Vehicle Make, Model, Year, Color, License Plate, Preferred Lot.

filler_pool.turn: Visit the community garden plot request page at greenthumb.city.gov/apply, fill in that I'd like a 10x10 plot, and submit.

state_item.title: Community Garden - Plot Application
state_item.content: Apply for a community garden plot! Available sizes: 5x5 ($25/season), 10x10 ($50/season), 10x20 ($90/season). Season runs April-October. Provided: water access, tool shed, composting bins. Requirements: attend orientation, maintain plot weekly, follow organic practices. Form: Name, Address, Email, Phone, Plot Size, Gardening Experience, What You Plan to Grow.

filler_pool.turn: Go to the concert ticket waitlist at livevenue.com/waitlist, fill in my email and that I want 2 tickets to the June 20 show, and submit.

state_item.title: LiveVenue - Waitlist Registration
state_item.content: Join the waitlist for sold-out shows! Current waitlist: June 20 - The Midnight (500 people ahead). June 22 - Japanese Breakfast (300 ahead). How it works: we notify by email 48hrs before if tickets become available. You have 2 hours to purchase. Form: Name, Email, Phone, Event Date, Number of Tickets (max 4), Seating Preference.

filler_pool.turn: Visit the swimming lessons registration at aquacenter.com/lessons/register, fill in my child's name as Emma and age as 7, and submit.

state_item.title: AquaCenter - Swimming Lessons Registration
state_item.content: Register for swimming lessons! Levels: Tadpole (ages 3-5, water comfort), Minnow (ages 5-7, basic strokes), Dolphin (ages 7-10, all strokes), Shark (ages 10+, competitive prep). Sessions: 8 weeks, 2x/week, 30min. Cost: $160/session. Discounts: siblings 10% off, multi-session 15% off. Form: Child Name, Age, Parent Name, Email, Phone, Current Level, Preferred Schedule, Medical Conditions.

filler_pool.turn: Go to the meal kit subscription signup at freshbox.com/subscribe, fill in that I want the vegetarian plan for 2 people, and submit.

state_item.title: FreshBox - Meal Kit Subscription
state_item.content: Choose your meal plan! Options: Classic, Vegetarian, Vegan, Keto, Family. Servings: 2 or 4 people. Meals per week: 3, 4, or 5. Pricing from $8.99/serving. First box 50% off. Delivery: choose your day (Tue-Sat). Skip or cancel anytime. Form: Name, Email, Plan Type, Number of People, Meals Per Week, Delivery Day, Allergies/Dislikes, Promo Code.

filler_pool.turn: Visit the URL https://makerspace.community.org/membership, then fill in the form field 'plan' with value 'monthly' and submit the form with form data: name 'Alex Chen', email 'alex.chen@university.edu', plan 'monthly', interests 'laser cutting, 3D printing'.

state_item.title: Community Makerspace - Membership Application
state_item.content: Join our community makerspace! Plans: Day Pass ($15), Monthly ($75/mo), Annual ($720/yr). Equipment access: 3D printers, laser cutters, CNC router, woodshop, electronics bench. Safety orientation required before first use. Hours: Mon-Sat 9am-10pm, Sun 10am-6pm. Form: Name, Email, Phone, Plan Type, Interests, Experience Level.

probe_filler_pool.turn: Visit the interlibrary loan request form at university.edu/library/ill-request and fill in the book title 'Deep Learning' by Goodfellow et al., then submit.

state_item.title: University Library - Interlibrary Loan Request
state_item.content: Request books and articles from other libraries. Typical delivery: 5-10 business days for books, 1-3 days for articles (electronic). Free for students and faculty. Form: Title, Author, ISBN/DOI, Needed By Date, Pickup Location. Maximum 10 active requests.

probe_filler_pool.turn: Go to the campus shuttle pass application at transit.university.edu/pass/apply, fill in my student ID as STU-2024-5678, and submit.

state_item.title: Campus Shuttle Pass Application
state_item.content: Apply for your free campus shuttle pass. Valid for all campus routes and the downtown connector. Requires valid student or employee ID. Replacement fee: $15 for lost passes. Active immediately upon approval. Form: Name, ID Number, Department, Photo Upload.

probe_filler_pool.turn: Visit the URL https://rec.university.edu/intramural/register and submit the form with form data: team_name 'Gradient Descent', sport 'basketball', captain_email 'alex.chen@university.edu', division 'recreational'.

state_item.title: Intramural Sports - Team Registration
state_item.content: Register for intramural sports leagues! Available: basketball, volleyball, soccer, softball, flag football. Divisions: recreational (fun-focused) and competitive. Season: 8 games + playoffs. Fee: $50/team. Roster size: 8-15 players. Registration deadline: May 15. Form: Team Name, Sport, Division, Captain Info, Roster.

probe_filler_pool.turn: Navigate to https://www.meetup.com/local-python-group/events/create and fill in the event title as 'Monthly Python Meetup - May' with the date set to 2026-05-20.

state_item.title: Create Event - Local Python Group
state_item.content: Create a new event for Local Python Group (450 members). Fields: Event Title, Date & Time, Location (online or in-person), Description, RSVP Limit, Co-hosts. Past events averaged 35 attendees. Venue suggestions: University Auditorium, TechHub Coworking, Online via Zoom.

probe_filler_pool.turn: Visit the newsletter preference center at sciencedaily.com/preferences and fill in the topics field with 'artificial intelligence, neuroscience' to update my subscriptions.

state_item.title: ScienceDaily - Newsletter Preferences
state_item.content: Customize your ScienceDaily digest. Available topics: Artificial Intelligence, Neuroscience, Climate, Space, Health, Biology, Physics, Engineering. Frequency: daily digest or weekly summary. Format: HTML or plain text. Manage: update topics anytime, pause delivery, or unsubscribe.

state_item.title: Social Security Disability Application
state_item.content: Apply for Social Security Disability Insurance (SSDI). Required: Medical records, physician statement, work history, personal identification. Processing time: 3-6 months.

state_item.title: Create a Google Account
state_item.content: Create your Google Account. Enter your name, choose a username, and set a password. Optional: phone number and recovery email for account security.

state_item.content: Petition for Alien Relative. Required: Petitioner information, beneficiary information, proof of relationship, supporting documents. Filing fee: $535.
